results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: THRESHOLD RE-CHECK (day 21): official toll sustained/flat at 4,490 (16,740 injured) with 19,500+ still in displacement camps; growth is disaster-scale caseload (natural attribution), NOT a NEW discrete own-conduct failure (no evidenced aid diversion or responder-access denial). Own-conduct response-failure move stays in the low -3s, does NOT cross -5pt. CONFIRM 18.0, strong downward watch.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Operation Shaaban toll rose to 125 combined (79 dedicated) as of Jul 14, up from 117 on Jul 13; security-source and largely unverified. Continuation of already-priced Balochistan counter-insurgency/enforced-disappearance pattern; no discrete independently-verified new state step-change. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Israeli drone strike killed 4 in Nabatieh al-Fawqa (incl. a school principal) despite the Jun 21 ceasefire; this is Israel's conduct (scored vs Israel), not Lebanese own conduct. No Lebanese own-conduct step-change. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 17.2.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: ATTRIBUTION SPLIT: own-conduct executions/repression (784+ YTD) intensify an already-priced pattern, but from 2.5 even a move to floor (0.0) is only -2.5, so a >=5pt move is arithmetically impossible. US CENTCOM RESUMED the Hormuz naval blockade Jul 14 + third-weekend fire exchange + ceasefire near-collapse are US/interstate-attributable, logged for digest under US conduct, NOT scored against Iran. CONFIRM 2.5, strong downward watch.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Jul 14 Israeli strikes killed at least 9 in Gaza during the ceasefire, including 10-year-old Motaz Abu Shaar (Rafah) and 7 at a Jabalia police post; GMO reports 3,689+ ceasefire violations since Oct 2025, cumulative post-ceasefire toll exceeds 1,100. Own-conduct atrocity; already at harm-flag floor (0.0), reinforced. Floor sustained.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: MILESTONE: UN Fact-Finding Mission (Jul 8-9) formally found El Fasher atrocities (6,000+ killed in 3 days) bear 'distinct markers of genocide' and launched an urgent El Obeid inquiry as RSF replicates the encirclement tactics. RSF harm is non-state; SAF/state own-conduct atrocity record already priced. Already at harm-flag floor (0.0), CANNOT move lower. Floor sustained and substantively reinforced; logged as a significant evidentiary milestone.

results.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
results.key_finding: Bundibugyo Ebola toll jumped 600->702 confirmed deaths (1,926 cases) in two days; WHO estimates true count 4,000-8,000. Toll is largely externally-inflicted (natural epidemic); own-conduct aggravators (army redeployment, blocked access, health-worker walkout) already priced near-floor. From 2.3, a >=5pt move is arithmetically impossible. CONFIRM 2.3, watch.

results.name: Tunisia
results.key_finding: Open 2026-07-10 proposal (34.4->23.8) REAFFIRMED at DAY 5 (status proposed). Scanner already appended the day-5 reaffirmation_log entry (last_reaffirmed 2026-07-14); NO duplicate proposal opened and NO double-append. No new dated escalation beyond the already-reflected Jul 7-8 mass sentencing (21 opposition figures 12-35yr; Ghannouchi 14yr) and Jul 8 HRC-62 close; operative record unchanged, fully consistent with the 23.8 basis; figure unchanged; published stays 34.4 (not applied).

results.name: China
results.key_finding: HRW (Jun 29): Hong Kong issued arrest warrants/bounties on 15 more overseas Hong Kong Parliament activists and amended Prison Rules to restrict inmate-lawyer contact on national-security grounds. Consistent with, not a departure from, the sustained repression baseline (Ethnic Unity Law effective Jul 1). No distinct new dated escalation. CONFIRM 19.5.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: WFP Jul 2 hunger record (worst in nearly a decade) remains operative: 36.2M food insecure nationally, 17M+ crisis+ in the north; WFP can support only 740,000 of 6.2M in need across three NE states. Continuation of the already-priced man-made northern famine (Jun 19 band crossing). No materially new own-conduct escalation. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 18.0.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: OHCHR: 265 civilians killed / 1,816 injured in June (highest since early 2022), ~170 civilian casualties/day in July - harm inflicted ON Ukraine BY Russia (externally-inflicted, scored vs Russia, not Ukraine). No Ukrainian own-conduct step-change. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 50.0.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: OHCHR-reported 'deadliest attack in weeks' and June's 265 civilian deaths on Ukraine are Russia's own conduct (war of aggression), reinforcing the floor; EU Jul 3 sanctioned six individuals tied to Navalny's chemical-weapons poisoning/death. Already at harm-flag floor (0.0). Floor sustained.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: ~1,728-detainee exchange REMAINS stalled; Grundberg's Jul 11 'renewed commitment' not yet implemented. Announced-but-unexecuted swap is not a realized own-conduct improvement; prior reversed upward-watch positive not carried. Humanitarian baseline unchanged (73 UN staff detained, 18.3M food insecure). Floor (0.0) sustained.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Junta says it broke a rebel blockade around the Anefis base (Jul 10); JNIM fuel-tanker blockade of Bamako continues unbroken since Sep 2025. Blockade/northern harm principally non-state (JNIM); junta own-conduct abuses already priced at uniform-1.5 near-floor. Cross-peer calibration flag (~21 days open) carried forward as flag-for-review, NOT resolved unilaterally. Sub-threshold. CONFIRM 12.5.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: No new conversion-trigger event this cycle. China CVERC/NVD backdoor allegation (already assessed/held 07-12) remains a rival-state allegation, not adjudicated; Anthropic rejects it. Claude Max usage-cap class action already screened outside window. New age/identity-verification privacy provision (effective Jul 8) is protective, not negative. CONFIRM 59.1 + heightened downward watch (0.9 below Established/60.0).

calibration_flags_documented: mali-burkina-faso-cross-peer (open ~21 days, coordinator-level; Mali uniform-1.5 near-floor baseline carried forward as flag-for-review; NOT resolved unilaterally). Burkina Faso not in today's 15.

special_attention_determinations.sudan: UN Fact-Finding Mission FORMALLY found El Fasher atrocities bear 'distinct markers of genocide' (Jul 8-9) and launched an urgent El Obeid inquiry - a grave NEW escalation in international-legal characterization. RSF harm is non-state; SAF/state own-conduct record already priced. Already at 0.0 floor; CANNOT move lower. Floor confirmed and strongly reinforced; documented as a significant evidentiary milestone despite no numeric move being possible.
special_attention_determinations.iran: Attribution split enforced: own-conduct (executions/repression, priced near-floor) vs US/interstate-attributable Hormuz-blockade RESUMPTION (US CENTCOM restarted the naval blockade 4pm Jul 14), third-weekend fire exchange, and near-collapse of the ceasefire. Near-floor arithmetic (from 2.5, floor is only -2.5) forecloses any >=5pt move. CONFIRM 2.5; US blockade/strikes logged for digest under US conduct, NOT scored against Iran.
special_attention_determinations.israel: Jul 14 own-conduct killings during ceasefire (9 killed incl. 10-year-old Motaz Abu Shaar; 3,689+ violations, cumulative 1,100+) documented as floor-reinforcing. Already at 0.0; cannot move lower. Floor sustained.
special_attention_determinations.venezuela: Threshold re-check (day 21): official toll sustained/flat at 4,490, 19,500+ still displaced; growth is disaster-scale natural-attribution caseload, NOT a NEW discrete own-conduct failure (no evidenced aid diversion or responder-access denial). Own-conduct move stays low -3s, does NOT cross -5pt. No proposal. CONFIRM 18.0.
special_attention_determinations.drc: Ebola toll jumped 600->702 confirmed deaths in two days (WHO true-count est. 4,000-8,000). Epidemic is natural attribution; own-government response aggravators (army redeployment, blocked access, health-worker walkout) already priced near-floor. From 2.3, a >=5pt move is arithmetically impossible. CONFIRM 2.3 + watch.
special_attention_determinations.anthropic: No new conversion-trigger event this cycle. China backdoor already assessed/held 07-12 (rival-state allegation, not adjudicated); Anthropic rejects. Usage-cap class action screened outside window. New identity-verification provision is protective. CONFIRM 59.1 + heightened downward watch. Avoid geopolitically-motivated over-weighting.
special_attention_determinations.tunisia: Open proposal (34.4->23.8) REAFFIRMED day 5, not duplicated. Scanner already appended the day-5 reaffirmation_log entry (last_reaffirmed 2026-07-14); assessor did NOT double-append. No new escalation beyond Jul 7-8 mass sentencing + Jul 8 HRC-62 close; figure unchanged; published stays 34.4 (not applied).
special_attention_determinations.mali-burkina-faso: Cross-peer calibration flag documented as flag-for-review, NOT unilaterally resolved.

us_conduct_dimension_for_digest: iran: US CENTCOM RESUMED the Strait of Hormuz naval blockade from 4pm Jul 14; US-Iran fire exchanged a third consecutive weekend (Jul 13-14) pushing the ceasefire toward total collapse; Trump proposed then reversed a 20% cargo-value 'guardian' fee on Hormuz shippers. Interstate harm attributable to the United States, logged for digest under US conduct - NOT scored against Iran.
lebanon/israel(vs-lebanon): Jul 6-12 Israeli drone strikes in southern Lebanon (4 killed in Nabatieh al-Fawqa) are Israel's conduct, not Lebanese-state own conduct.

ukraine/russia(vs-ukraine): OHCHR June record (265 civilians killed, 1,816 injured) and 'deadliest attack in weeks' on Ukraine are Russia-attributable; scored vs Russia (floor reinforced), not vs Ukraine.

notes.no_index_modification: No published index JSON modified. Human-approval gate respected; score-updater NOT run. validate-indexes.mjs run at close: 0 errors.
notes.sidecars: No subdimension sidecars written - zero dimension changes across all 15 entities (14 confirmations + 1 proposal reaffirmation).
